name: Enrichment Agent Evaluations — 12 IoC Enrichment Scenarios

parts.text:
## TASK

Enrich the following indicators from Chronicle case CASE-EVAL-001 following your instructions.

**Case ID:** CASE-EVAL-001
**Client ID:** eval-client
**IoCs to enrich:**
- IP: 203.0.113.42

**Alert context:**
Phishing alert. User clicked link pointing to this IP. Possible C2 infrastructure.

Enrichment complete for CASE-EVAL-001.

```json
{
  "enrichments": [
    {
      "ioc_type": "IP",
      "ioc_value": "203.0.113.42",
      "gti_verdict": "MALICIOUS",
      "gti_score": 92,
      "gti_categories": ["command_and_control", "phishing"],
      "malware_families": ["Emotet"],
      "mitre_techniques": ["T1071.001", "T1566.002"],
      "historical_activity": {"first_seen": "2026-02-15T00:00:00Z", "last_seen": "2026-03-27T10:30:00Z", "internal_hits": 15},
      "related_iocs": ["login-secure.example.com"],
      "context_summary": "IP 203.0.113.42 is confirmed malicious C2 infrastructure associated with Emotet campaigns. Active in phishing and credential harvesting operations.",
      "recommended_blocking": true
    }
  ],
  "threat_context": {
    "overall_threat_level": "CRITICAL",
    "threat_actors": ["TA505"],
    "malware_families": ["Emotet"],
    "mitre_techniques": ["T1071.001", "T1566.002"],
    "enrichment_completeness": 0.95
  }
}
```

## TASK

Enrich the following indicators from Chronicle case CASE-EVAL-002 following your instructions.

**Case ID:** CASE-EVAL-002

**Alert context:**

      "malware_families": [],

      "related_iocs": ["203.0.113.42"],

## TASK

**Case ID:** CASE-EVAL-003

**IoCs to enrich:**
- IP: 203.0.113.42

- HASH: a1b2c3d4e5f6789012345678abcdef01

**Alert context:**
Multi-stage attack: phishing email delivered malware payload, which connects to C2 infrastructure. All three IoCs linked to same campaign.

All 3 IoCs enriched for CASE-EVAL-003.

```json

  "enrichments": [
    {

      "context_summary": "C2 server for Emotet campaign",
      "recommended_blocking": true
    },
    {
      "ioc_type": "DOMAIN",
      "ioc_value": "login-secure.example.com",
      "gti_verdict": "MALICIOUS",
      "gti_score": 88,
      "gti_categories": ["phishing"],
      "malware_families": ["Emotet"],
      "mitre_techniques": ["T1566.002"],
      "historical_activity": {"first_seen": "2026-03-24T00:00:00Z", "last_seen": "2026-03-27T08:00:00Z", "internal_hits": 3},
      "related_iocs": ["203.0.113.42"],
      "context_summary": "Phishing delivery domain for Emotet payload",
      "recommended_blocking": true
    },
    {
      "ioc_type": "HASH",
      "ioc_value": "a1b2c3d4e5f6789012345678abcdef01",
      "gti_verdict": "MALICIOUS",
      "gti_score": 95,
      "gti_categories": ["trojan", "dropper"],
      "malware_families": ["Emotet"],
      "mitre_techniques": ["T1059.001", "T1055"],
      "historical_activity": {"first_seen": "2026-03-20T00:00:00Z", "last_seen": "2026-03-27T09:00:00Z", "internal_hits": 1},
      "related_iocs": ["203.0.113.42", "login-secure.example.com"],

```

## TASK

Enrich the following indicators from Chronicle case CASE-EVAL-004 following your instructions.

**Case ID:** CASE-EVAL-004
**Client ID:** eval-client
**IoCs to enrich:**
- HASH: e5f6a7b8c9d0123456789abcdef01234

**Alert context:**
Ransomware alert on finance-server-03. Binary detected with .locked file extension encryption behavior. Need malware family identification and behavior analysis.

```json
{
  "enrichments": [
    {
      "ioc_type": "HASH",
      "ioc_value": "e5f6a7b8c9d0123456789abcdef01234",
      "gti_verdict": "MALICIOUS",
      "gti_score": 98,
      "gti_categories": ["ransomware", "trojan"],
      "malware_families": ["LockBit 3.0"],
      "mitre_techniques": ["T1486", "T1490", "T1083", "T1135"],
      "historical_activity": {"first_seen": "2026-03-01T00:00:00Z", "last_seen": "2026-03-27T06:00:00Z", "internal_hits": 1},
      "related_iocs": ["lockbit-ransom.onion"],
      "context_summary": "LockBit 3.0 ransomware binary. Encrypts files, deletes shadow copies, enumerates network shares for lateral spread. Associated with LockBit RaaS affiliate program.",
      "recommended_blocking": true
    }
  ],
  "threat_context": {
    "overall_threat_level": "CRITICAL",
    "threat_actors": ["LockBit RaaS"],
    "malware_families": ["LockBit 3.0"],
    "mitre_techniques": ["T1486", "T1490", "T1083", "T1135"],
    "enrichment_completeness": 0.92
  }
}
```

## TASK

Enrich the following indicators from Chronicle case CASE-EVAL-011 following your instructions.

**Case ID:** CASE-EVAL-011
**Client ID:** eval-client
**IoCs to enrich:**
- IP: 185.220.101.42

**Alert context:**
Impossible travel alert. Authentication from this IP in Lagos, Nigeria. Need to determine if this is a Tor exit node or known proxy.

```json
{
  "enrichments": [
    {
      "ioc_type": "IP",
      "ioc_value": "185.220.101.42",
      "gti_verdict": "SUSPICIOUS",
      "gti_score": 65,
      "gti_categories": ["tor_exit_node", "anonymizer"],
      "malware_families": [],
      "mitre_techniques": ["T1090.003"],
      "historical_activity": {"first_seen": "2025-06-01T00:00:00Z", "last_seen": "2026-03-27T14:31:00Z", "internal_hits": 2},
      "related_iocs": [],
      "context_summary": "Known Tor exit node. Used for anonymous access. Not inherently malicious but commonly used to obscure attacker origin. Two previous hits in internal logs.",
      "recommended_blocking": false
    }
  ],
  "threat_context": {
    "overall_threat_level": "MEDIUM",
    "threat_actors": [],
    "malware_families": [],
    "mitre_techniques": ["T1090.003"],
    "enrichment_completeness": 0.80
  }
}
```

## TASK

Enrich the following indicators from Chronicle case CASE-EVAL-008 following your instructions.

**Case ID:** CASE-EVAL-008
**Client ID:** eval-client
**IoCs to enrich:**
- DOMAIN: xk7f9.duckdns.org

**Alert context:**
DNS tunneling suspicion. High-entropy DNS queries to this DuckDNS domain. 4,200 TXT queries per hour from DEV-WS-12.

```json
{
  "enrichments": [
    {
      "ioc_type": "DOMAIN",
      "ioc_value": "xk7f9.duckdns.org",
      "gti_verdict": "SUSPICIOUS",
      "gti_score": 55,
      "gti_categories": ["dynamic_dns", "potentially_malicious"],
      "malware_families": [],
      "mitre_techniques": ["T1071.004", "T1568.002"],
      "historical_activity": {"first_seen": "2026-03-24T00:00:00Z", "last_seen": "2026-03-27T10:00:00Z", "internal_hits": 4200},
      "related_iocs": [],
      "context_summary": "Newly registered DuckDNS domain with DGA-like characteristics. No confirmed malware association in GTI but dynamic DNS + high query volume + high entropy strongly suggests DNS tunneling or C2.",
      "recommended_blocking": false
    }
  ],
  "threat_context": {
    "overall_threat_level": "MEDIUM",
    "threat_actors": [],
    "malware_families": [],
    "mitre_techniques": ["T1071.004", "T1568.002"],
    "enrichment_completeness": 0.60
  }
}
```

args.natural_language_query: DNS queries to xk7f9.duckdns.org in the last 24 hours

## TASK

Enrich the following indicators from Chronicle case CASE-EVAL-014 following your instructions.

**Case ID:** CASE-EVAL-014
**Client ID:** eval-client
**IoCs to enrich:**
- USER: departing.employee@company.com

**Alert context:**
Insider threat alert. Departing employee accessed 847 files in 2 hours. Need entity behavior analysis from Chronicle.

```json
{
  "enrichments": [
    {
      "ioc_type": "USER",
      "ioc_value": "departing.employee@company.com",
      "gti_verdict": "UNKNOWN",
      "gti_categories": [],
      "malware_families": [],
      "mitre_techniques": ["T1530", "T1074.001"],
      "historical_activity": {"first_seen": "2025-06-01T00:00:00Z", "last_seen": "2026-03-27T16:00:00Z", "internal_hits": 847},
      "related_iocs": [],
      "context_summary": "User entity analysis from Chronicle. 847 file access events in 2 hours vs 30/day baseline. Access included source code, architecture docs, and API keys. Entity flagged for data staging behavior.",
      "recommended_blocking": false
    }
  ],
  "threat_context": {
    "overall_threat_level": "MEDIUM",
    "threat_actors": [],
    "malware_families": [],
    "mitre_techniques": ["T1530", "T1074.001"],
    "enrichment_completeness": 0.55,
    "note": "User entities cannot be enriched via GTI — results based on Chronicle SIEM data only"
  }
}
```

args.natural_language_query: file access events by departing.employee@company.com in the last 48 hours

parts.text:
## TASK

Enrich the following indicators from Chronicle case CASE-EVAL-009 following your instructions.

**Case ID:** CASE-EVAL-009
**Client ID:** eval-client
**IoCs to enrich:**
- HOST: web-server-prod-02

**Alert context:**
Cryptomining detected on this host. Need full entity activity summary — process launches, network connections, user context.

```json
{
  "enrichments": [
    {
      "ioc_type": "HOST",
      "ioc_value": "web-server-prod-02",
      "gti_verdict": "UNKNOWN",
      "gti_categories": [],
      "malware_families": [],
      "mitre_techniques": ["T1496", "T1059.004"],
      "historical_activity": {"first_seen": "2025-01-15T00:00:00Z", "last_seen": "2026-03-27T12:00:00Z", "internal_hits": 250},
      "related_iocs": ["pool.minexmr.com"],
      "context_summary": "Production web server with xmrig process, unauthorized cron job, and connection to mining pool. Entity analysis shows anomalous process launches starting 2 hours ago under www-data user.",
      "recommended_blocking": false
    }
  ],
  "threat_context": {
    "overall_threat_level": "MEDIUM",
    "threat_actors": [],
    "malware_families": [],
    "mitre_techniques": ["T1496", "T1059.004"],
    "enrichment_completeness": 0.65,
    "note": "Host entities enriched via Chronicle SIEM only"
  }
}
```

args.natural_language_query: process launches and network connections on web-server-prod-02 in the last 4 hours

## TASK

Enrich the following indicators from Chronicle case CASE-EVAL-013 following your instructions.

**Case ID:** CASE-EVAL-013
**Client ID:** eval-client
**IoCs to enrich:**
- HASH: b4d5e6f7a8b9c0d1e2f3a4b5c6d7e8f9

**Alert context:**
Suspicious PowerShell script dropped at C:\ProgramData\tmp\update.ps1 on ACCT-WS-03. Need full file behavior analysis and malware family identification.

```json
{
  "enrichments": [
    {
      "ioc_type": "HASH",
      "ioc_value": "b4d5e6f7a8b9c0d1e2f3a4b5c6d7e8f9",
      "gti_verdict": "MALICIOUS",
      "gti_score": 85,
      "gti_categories": ["backdoor", "powershell_malware"],
      "malware_families": ["PowerShell Empire"],
      "mitre_techniques": ["T1059.001", "T1053.005", "T1547.001", "T1082"],
      "historical_activity": {"first_seen": "2026-03-15T00:00:00Z", "last_seen": "2026-03-27T03:15:00Z", "internal_hits": 1},
      "related_iocs": [],
      "context_summary": "PowerShell Empire backdoor. Creates scheduled task for persistence, performs system reconnaissance, and establishes reverse shell. Behavior analysis shows obfuscated payload execution and registry key creation for persistence.",
      "recommended_blocking": true
    }
  ],
  "threat_context": {
    "overall_threat_level": "HIGH",
    "threat_actors": [],
    "malware_families": ["PowerShell Empire"],
    "mitre_techniques": ["T1059.001", "T1053.005", "T1547.001", "T1082"],

```
